title: Beautiful and peaceful
description: A modpack that enhances Minecraft’s performance and visuals, while adding new content.
body:
![Beautiful and peaceful](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7729aec49556ca0ed348adddeefdb9fc5753faaf.png)

### This modpack focuses mainly on survival mode, adding more structures, QoL features, new enchantments, and changes to bosses.

### Features
### No More F3
The F3 screen now only shows your FPS and nothing else. If you want to see your coordinates, you’ll first need to craft a compass. Once equipped, it will display your current position.
![No f3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c4d0bb8c25eb223c27bda941b0e6eb70d7a9e54.png)


### Revive your pet
Revive your pet using an full charge respawn anchor
![Zombie wolf](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/078eb48c8c0058d0a984d55342adf51bbb1b4fc7.png)
![Skeleton wolf](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2cd224932d55854f0879a24f83a2c4aaa72b5169.png)

### New End Content
After defeating the Ender Dragon, you’ll find even more to explore in the End dimension like unique biomes, new challenges, and a brand-new way to travel to dimensions.

![THE END](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ddfaff118a37315e362ab08b6168434cc779e61f.png)

### Happy Ghasts
The Happy Ghast is here!

![Happy gasth](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/537faf570f1a7ba845640a2e5facb97b796b549d.png)


### And much more to discover!
